The signature format 'application/x-x509-ca-cert' is not checked (known formats: application/jose and application/pkcs7-signature)
HL7 Defined CodeSystems SHOULD have a stated value for the caseSensitive element so that users know the status and meaning of the code system clearly
Code systems published by HL7 SHALL conform to the ShareableCodeSystem profile, which says that the element CodeSystem.caseSensitive is mandatory, but it is not present
